name: Oven-Dried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Lightly coat a cookie sheet or baking pan with olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Slice tomatoes (plum tomatoes work best) into 1-inch slices crosswise.
4. Arrange the tomato slices tightly together on the prepared pan, filling it as much as possible.
5. Drizzle the tomatoes lightly with olive oil, then sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. If desired, sprinkle with fresh herbs such as thyme, rosemary, oregano, or garlic (alone or in combination).
7. Roast for 45 minutes to 1 hour. The tomatoes should become shriveled and dehydrated without burning.
8. The flavor will intensify and become richer the longer the tomatoes are left in the oven.
